evals.expected_output: Loads Agent Mail MCP tool via ToolSearch and calls fetch_inbox, displays messages as a table

assertions.name: uses-toolsearch-for-agent-mail
assertions.description: Response uses ToolSearch to load an Agent Mail MCP tool before calling it

assertions.name: no-invented-cli-command
assertions.description: Response does NOT invent a 'relay messaging' or 'relay inbox' CLI command that doesn't exist

evals.prompt: send a message to the digital-collector project that the relay config has been updated and they should restart
evals.expected_output: Loads send_message MCP tool via ToolSearch and attempts to send; handles missing recipient gracefully

assertions.name: uses-toolsearch-for-agent-mail
assertions.description: Response uses ToolSearch to load an Agent Mail MCP tool before calling it

assertions.name: addresses-digital-collector
assertions.description: Response targets digital-collector project in the message

assertions.name: no-invented-cli-command
assertions.description: Response does NOT invent a 'relay messaging' or 'relay send' CLI command

evals.prompt: I need to coordinate with the other agent working on famdeck-atlas — let them know I'm starting work on the skills/init file
evals.expected_output: Loads Agent Mail tools, checks inbox for existing coordination messages, sends coordination message about skills/init

assertions.name: uses-toolsearch-for-agent-mail
assertions.description: Response uses ToolSearch to load an Agent Mail MCP tool before calling it

assertions.name: checks-inbox-before-sending
assertions.description: Response checks inbox first to see if there are existing coordination messages before sending

assertions.name: mentions-skills-init
assertions.description: Coordination message explicitly mentions skills/init file

assertions.name: no-invented-cli-command
assertions.description: Response does NOT invent a relay CLI messaging command
